task_completion.description: Verify that a bookmark folder named 'Mountain Airports' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the browser's bookmark bar or bookmark manager for a folder explicitly named 'Mountain Airports'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the AirNav pages for KASE, KTEX, and KEGE are bookmarked in the folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Mountain Airports' bookmark folder or bookmark manager to confirm it contains links to the AirNav pages for KASE, KTEX, and KEGE.

task_completion.description: Verify the KASE LOC/DME-E approach plate PDF is downloaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the file manager in the Downloads folder or the browser's download history for a PDF file with a name indicating the KASE LOC/DME-E (or SPECIAL) approach plate.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and structure of the airport_briefing.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing ~/Documents/airport_briefing.json. It must contain a 'briefing_date' key and an 'airports' object with nested keys for 'KASE', 'KTEX', and 'KEGE'.

task_completion.description: Verify the accuracy of the collected data for KASE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON file content for KASE. It should show elevation ~7837.9, longest_runway 8006, frequency_mhz 118.85, and artcc 'Denver' (or similar).

task_completion.description: Verify the accuracy of the collected data for KTEX.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON file content for KTEX. It should show elevation ~9069.7, longest_runway 7111, frequency_mhz 123.0 (or 122.8), and artcc 'Denver' (or similar).

task_completion.description: Verify the accuracy of the collected data for KEGE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON file content for KEGE. It should show elevation ~6547.4, longest_runway 9000, frequency_mhz 119.8, and artcc 'Denver' (or similar).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used a web browser to visit AirNav.com.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the web browser open and navigated to AirNav.com pages for the requested airports.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF was genuinely downloaded from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's download indicator or a PDF viewer showing the actual approach plate, rather than an empty file created via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON file was constructed rather than copy-pasted from a pre-existing script or hallucinated without browsing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent switching between the browser and a text editor/terminal to input the gathered data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified data from AirNav.com: KASE (Aspen-Pitkin): Elevation 7837.9 ft, Runway 8006 ft, CTAF 118.85 MHz, ARTCC Denver. KTEX (Telluride): Elevation 9069.7 ft, Runway 7111 ft, CTAF 123.0 MHz (or 122.8 MHz), ARTCC Denver. KEGE (Eagle County): Elevation 6547.4 ft, Runway 9000 ft, CTAF 119.8 MHz, ARTCC Denver. Minor rounding in the JSON file is acceptable.
